q: What is your major? / What subject are you studying?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này yêu cầu bạn kể tên ngành học hoặc các môn học cụ thể. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Không chỉ kể tên, hãy mô tả ngắn gọn về ngành đó (ngành đó nghiên cứu về cái gì/lĩnh vực nào). 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ chuyên môn để thể hiện vốn từ vựng phong phú.

band7.text: My major is Graphic Design. It's a field that combines creativity with technology. I learn how to create visual content for websites, advertisements, and magazines using various software programs.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, mô tả súc tích về chuyên ngành. Sử dụng từ vựng phù hợp.

band8.text: I'm currently majoring in Environmental Science. This discipline focuses on understanding the complex interactions between humans and the natural world, particularly looking into sustainable solutions for modern ecological problems.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ học thuật tốt như 'focuses on understanding', 'complex interactions', 'sustainable solutions'.

band9.text: I specialize in Biomedical Engineering, an interdisciplinary field that bridges the gap between biology and engineering principles. My studies revolve around developing cutting-edge medical technologies and equipment to improve healthcare outcomes.
band9.note: Diễn đạt cực kỳ chuyên nghiệp ('specialize in', 'interdisciplinary field', 'bridges the gap'). Cấu trúc câu linh hoạt.

v.example: After graduation, I hope to specialize in digital marketing.
Biotechnology is a highly interdisciplinary field of study.
New research projects are designed to bridge the gap between theory and practice.
Students have access to cutting-edge technology in our laboratories.
The first year of the course revolves around basic scientific principles.
Sociology is a fascinating academic discipline that studies human society.
The course provides a solid foundation of theoretical knowledge.
We spend a lot of time in the lab exploring the practical application of the theories.
Ethics is an essential part of the core curriculum for law students.
Internships are vital for gaining hands-on experience in the industry.
Studying mathematics helps develop strong analytical skills.
Our university is known for its research-oriented approach to science.
I'm currently focusing on advanced algorithms as my specialist subject.
Business Administration is a popular major among international students.
I'm majoring in History but decided to minor in French.
I regularly attend the guest speaker seminar series on campus.

v.meaning: luận văn (thường là thạc sĩ/tiến sĩ)
v.example: He is in the process of writing his doctoral dissertation.
Fifty percent of the final grade is based on coursework.
We have a three-hour lab session every Wednesday afternoon.
Geology students spend several weeks each summer doing field work.
The university celebrates academic achievement at the annual awards gala.
My parents are flying in to attend my graduation ceremony.
Many graduates choose to continue with postgraduate study.
She is a doctoral candidate specializing in renewable energy.
The lecturer explained the complex concept very clearly.
Professor Smith is a leading expert in the field of archaeology.
Students should check the syllabus for the required reading list.
I need to complete 120 credit hours to graduate.
The university provides high-quality tuition in a wide range of subjects.
The library is a quiet place for scholars to do their research.
Historical researchers often spend weeks in the national archives.
Her thesis was on modern literary criticism.
The business course uses many real-world case studies.
Scientific papers undergo a rigorous peer review process before publication.
The library has an extensive collection of reference materials.

v.meaning: thư mục tài liệu tham khảo
v.example: Your essay must include a full bibliography.
Universities have strict rules against plagiarism.

v.meaning: sự liêm chính trong học thuật
v.example: Maintaining academic integrity is essential for all students.
Group projects encourage collaborative learning among students.
The goal of the course is to build a strong knowledge base for future studies.

v.meaning: đường cong học tập (mức độ khó của việc học)
v.example: Coding has a steep learning curve for beginners.
We were asked to provide a critical analysis of the current economic situation.
Early childhood education is crucial for cognitive development.

v.ipa: khả năng sử dụng công nghệ số
v.example: Digital literacy is an essential skill in the modern job market.
The university encourages innovation through its startup incubator.
Our engineering program is designed to meet the latest industry standards.
Many graduates pursue further professional development workshops.
My studies are directly related to my intended career path in law.
Choosing a STEM major often leads to better job prospects.
International student exchange programs foster a global perspective.
